source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/11_Audit F-up/240415-17 ISO 갱신심사 & 2,3G MDR 심사 - 3EC/MDR 보완/[2nd response TD by H&abyz] Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector (08 March 2024) pdf/A-TCF-5-157 Clinical Evaluation/Appendix I Checklist for the release of the clinical evaluation report (rev.2).pdf

document.title: Checklist for the release of the clinical evaluation report

sourceSummary.oneLine: Rev. 2 checklist for releasing the clinical evaluation report for H&abyz Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector models A1717MCW, A1417MCW, and F1417MCW.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Used to verify that the clinical evaluation report is readable, complete, updated, aligned with MDR GSPR requirements, and supported by clinical evidence before release.
keyPoints: The checklist is confidential technical documentation intended solely for H&abyz Co., Ltd.
The product is identified as Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector with model names A1717MCW, A1417MCW, and F1417MCW.
The report considers literature, clinical data, comparison with similar product, market research, and test report.
The checklist states this is a CE certification process and that the clinical evaluation report was updated on March 8, 2024 as Rev. 2.
The checklist asks whether conformity to MDR GSPR 1 and 8 is clearly stated.

entities.name: H&abyz Co., Ltd.
entities.evidence: Confidential This document is strictly private, confidential and intended solely for the use of H&abyz Co., Ltd.

entities.name: Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector
entities.evidence: Product name: Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector

entities.name: A-TCF-5-118 Clinical Evaluation Report
entities.evidence: A-TCF-5-118 Clinical Evaluation Report is issued on March 8, 2024 (Rev.2).

entities.name: A-TCF-5-149 Product Description
entities.evidence: It is described in A-TCF-5-149 Product Description.

entities.name: MDR GSPR 1, 8
entities.evidence: Is conformity to each of the relevant General Safety and Performance Requirements (MDR GSPR 1, 8) clearly stated

concepts.name: Clinical evaluation report release checklist
concepts.evidence: The following aspects should be checked for the release of a clinical evaluation report:

concepts.name: Clinical evaluation report
concepts.evidence: Checklist for the release of the clinical evaluation report

concepts.name: Clinical data summary
concepts.evidence: Yes, it is summarized in Clause 1 Summary of Clinical Evaluation Report

concepts.name: Equivalence demonstration
concepts.evidence: If equivalence is claimed, - is demonstration of equivalence included in the report?

concepts.name: PMS/PMCF data
concepts.evidence: has the latest PMS/ PMCF data been taken into consideration and has it been summarised and referenced in the report?

concepts.name: State of the art
concepts.evidence: In respect to current knowledge/ the state of the art

concepts.name: General Safety and Performance Requirements
concepts.pageTarget: MDR General Safety and Performance Requirements
concepts.evidence: General Safety and Performance Requirements (MDR GSPR 1, 8)

concepts.name: Residual risks and uncertainties
concepts.evidence: Do the report’s conclusions identify all residual risks and uncertainties or unanswered questions that should be addressed with PMS/ PMCF studies?

concepts.name: Evaluator CV and declaration of interests
concepts.evidence: CV of participants are attached in A-TCF-5-118 Clinical Evaluation Report and Declaration of interests is signed by evaluator.

evidence.claim: The document is Rev. 2 technical documentation titled Checklist for the release of the clinical evaluation report.
evidence.evidenceText: Technical Documentation Document No. Appendix l Rev. No. 2 Checklist for the release of the clinical evaluation report

evidence.claim: The document applies to Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector models A1717MCW, A1417MCW, and F1417MCW.
evidence.evidenceText: Product name: Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector Model name: A1717MCW / A1417MCW / F1417MCW

evidence.claim: The checklist was prepared, reviewed, and approved on March 8, 2024.
evidence.evidenceText: Prepared by Han, Jimin Quality team March 8, 2024 Reviewed by Lee, Dongjin R&D manager March 8, 2024 Approved by Hur, Namkyu Quality manager March 8, 2024

evidence.claim: The clinical evaluation report considered literature, clinical data, comparison with similar product, market research, and test report.
evidence.evidenceText: Yes, Literature, Clinical data, Comparison with similar product, market research and test report was considered in the report.

evidence.claim: The document states that latest PMS/PMCF data were not considered because this is a CE certification process.
evidence.evidenceText: No. This is CE certification process.

evidence.claim: The clinical evaluation report was prepared on October 20, 2023 as Rev. 1 and updated on March 8, 2024 as Rev. 2.
evidence.evidenceText: This report is prepared on October 20, 2023 (Rev.1).and updated on March 8, 2024 (Rev.2).

evidence.claim: The report coverage for models and clinical evidence references A-TCF-5-149 Product Description.
evidence.evidenceText: It is described in A-TCF-5-149 Product Description.

evidence.claim: Conformity to MDR GSPR 1 and 8 is addressed in Clinical Evaluation Report clauses 4.7 to 4.10.
evidence.evidenceText: It is addressed at Clause 4.7 ~ 4.10 of Clinical Evaluation Report
evidence.pageTarget: MDR General Safety and Performance Requirements

evidence.claim: Residual risks and uncertainties are addressed in A-TCF-5-118 Clinical Evaluation Report clause 6.
evidence.evidenceText: A-TCF-5-118 Clinical Evaluation Report includes that conclusions at Clause 6

evidence.claim: A-TCF-5-118 Clinical Evaluation Report was issued on March 8, 2024 as Rev. 2.
evidence.evidenceText: A-TCF-5-118 Clinical Evaluation Report is issued on March 8, 2024 (Rev.2).

evidence.claim: The evaluator is stated to be a medical doctor who uses the products, and the evaluator CV is attached.
evidence.evidenceText: Yes. Evaluator is a medical doctor who uses our products and his CV is attached.

evidence.claim: CVs and declaration of interests are attached as Appendix IV of A-TCF-5-118 and are stated to be up to date.
evidence.evidenceText: These documents is attached as Appendix IV of A-TCF-5-118 and they are up to date.
